basics.name: Elena Rodriguez
basics.label: UX Research Lead
basics.summary: Mixed-methods researcher helping product teams ship inclusive, evidence-based experiences. Specialist in fintech onboarding, accessibility audits, and longitudinal diary studies.

work.name: PayFlow Europe
work.description: Neobank serving 4M retail customers across Iberia
work.summary: Built and scaled a four-person research practice embedded in squads.
highlights: Reduced KYC drop-off 27% after redesign informed by contextual inquiry.
Established research ops: repository, consent templates, and incentive workflow.
Partnered with legal on WCAG 2.2 AA compliance roadmap for mobile app.

work.name: Design Studio Nova
work.description: Boutique UX consultancy for health and gov clients
work.summary: Led discovery and usability testing for public-sector digital services.
highlights: Conducted 120+ moderated sessions for national healthcare portal redesign.
Introduced service blueprinting workshops adopted by three ministries.

volunteer.summary: Matched early-career designers with industry mentors for portfolio and research critiques.
highlights: Organized quarterly research methods lightning talks.

awards.title: Research Impact Award
awards.summary: Honoured for research program that directly influenced three major product launches in 2024.

certificates.name: CPACC – Certified Professional in Accessibility Core Competencies

publications.name: Diary Studies at Scale in Regulated Industries
publications.summary: How to run asynchronous longitudinal research without compromising participant privacy.

projects.name: Inclusive Forms Pattern Library
projects.description: Open pattern library documenting accessible form components with research citations.
highlights: Referenced in PayFlow design system v3.

projects.name: Euro UX Research Meetup
projects.description: Monthly meetup series featuring practitioner talks on research in product orgs.
highlights: Sponsored by three local design agencies.

references.name: Miguel Santos
references.reference: Elena elevates every product conversation with clear, actionable insights. Her research practice is a model for embedding UX in agile fintech teams.
